articles.title: What we know so far about the collision and emergency response
articles.description: Nine people are in a critical condition out of a total of 28 still in hospital on Saturday, emergency services say.

articles.title: Talk of Starmer staying on to fight is fading - fast
articles.description: After Andy Burnham’s by-election victory, support for the prime minister is evaporating, writes Laura Kuenssberg.

articles.title: Steve Rosenberg: Moscow oil refinery attack brings Russia's war with Ukraine closer to home
articles.description: There are moments when life in Moscow feels completely normal - Thursday morning wasn't one of them, writes Steve Rosenberg.

articles.title: Extreme heat warning expanded as 36C heatwave approaches UK
articles.description: After a slightly cooler Saturday, temperatures will rise again, possibly touching 36C by Tuesday with a Met Office amber extreme heat warning set to come into force.
